meta.title: Banpro Factoring — Fast liquidity for your business
meta.description: Banpro Factoring S.A. provides immediate liquidity to SMEs through invoice purchasing. Credit line opening in 24 hours. 17+ branches across Chile.

hero.eyebrow: Direct financing, without assignment to third parties
hero.subtitle: Financial boutique with over 15 years turning invoices into working capital. Immediate risk decision, funds disbursed within a maximum of 4 hours.
hero.cta: I want to talk to an Executive

nosotros.label: Who we are
nosotros.title: Speed and closeness at the service of your business.
nosotros.description: Banpro S.A. is a factoring company founded by executives with extensive experience in the financial sector, focused on meeting the working capital financing needs of small and medium-sized enterprises through the purchase of their accounts receivable.
nosotros.v1_desc: Credit line opening in 24 hours. Same-day transaction processing.
nosotros.v2_desc: We know our clients and their needs. Direct contact with specialized account managers.
nosotros.v3_desc: All your transaction information available online, in real time.

factoring.label: Our service
factoring.title: Factoring in your hands.
factoring.description: Access immediate liquidity by assigning your invoices from anywhere. Our Web Factoring platform makes the process 100% digital, fast and transparent.
factoring.b1_desc: Sign your contract without leaving your office, using your advanced digital signature or directly on our platform.
factoring.b2_desc: Get a quote without being a client and assign your invoices with a single click. Subject to prior line approval.
factoring.b3_desc: Access your full transaction history for 100% transparent management in real time.

requisitos.label: Requirements to operate
requisitos.title: Get started in 24 hours.
requisitos.description: By submitting these documents, you will be ready to process your first factoring transaction within 24 hours.
requisitos.approval_note: Documents required to open a credit line:
requisitos.doc_rut: Copy of RUT (tax ID) of legal representative and partners
requisitos.doc_sii: VAT returns (Form. 29) for the last 12 months
requisitos.doc_resume: Company profile (age, business type, main clients)
requisitos.doc_constitution: Articles of incorporation and current amendments
requisitos.doc_board: Current board minutes with powers of attorney
requisitos.doc_ley20659: Statute obtained from the Companies and Societies Registry
requisitos.footnote:
a) Approval subject to verification of financial and legal background.
b) Additional documents may be requested after reviewing the submitted information.

sucursales.label: National presence
sucursales.title: 17 branches across Chile.
sucursales.description: From Iquique to Punta Arenas, we are where your business needs us.
sucursales.footer_note: Can't find a nearby branch? Contact us — we operate throughout Chile.

contacto.label: Contact
contacto.title: Request your evaluation
contacto.description: Leave us your details and one of our account managers will contact you within 24 hours.
contacto.success_desc: An executive will contact you within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Fast liquidity for small and medium-sized businesses. Operating in Chile and Peru.
